user.title: Lage Monitor
user.description: Aggregate official warning and news sources into a Home Assistant situation overview.

data.warn_mowas: Include civil protection alerts (MOWAS, BIWAPP, KATWARN)
data.include_news: Include major German news RSS feeds

init.title: Options
init.description: Choose which sources and filters Lage Monitor should use.

data.warn_mowas: Include civil protection alerts (MOWAS, BIWAPP, KATWARN)
data.include_news: Include major German news RSS feeds

data_description.nina_ars: No longer needed for warnung.bund.de and can be left empty.
data_description.warn_area: City, town, or district name as listed on warnung.bund.de, for example Stuttgart, Leonberg, or Landkreis Ludwigsburg.
data_description.news_limit: How many headlines can contribute to the situation scoring and map.
data_description.police_count_mode: Choose between all police items and only locally relevant entries.
data_description.focus_mode: Germany-wide uses all sources, local mode filters more strongly by keywords and radius.
data_description.local_keywords: Comma-separated places or regions, for example Stuttgart, Leonberg, Weilimdorf.
data_description.alert_radius_km: Radius used for local relevance around the Home position.
data_description.warn_mowas: Enable or disable the civil protection channels from warnung.bund.de.
data_description.warn_dwd: Enable or disable weather alerts from the German Weather Service.
data_description.scan_interval: How often the sources are refreshed.
